trigger_issues: False Positive: '请帮我写一段 Python 代码实现冒泡排序' triggered when it shouldn't (algorithm code, not project generation)
False Negative: '请帮我创建一个 FastAPI 项目，名称是 myapi，需要包含用户 CRUD 接口' didn't trigger (core intent)
False Negative: '帮我写一个自动化脚本' didn't trigger (adjacent intent)
behavior_issues: Eval-1 (CLI tool): skill_a output truncated causing 0% pass rate vs baseline 100%
Baseline for eval-3 incorrectly triggered the skill (violated baseline condition)
Eval quality score 0.67 - many assertions trivially pass (65% always_pass rate)
Statistical significance p=0.70 - results are directional only, not statistically significant
strengths: FastAPI project generation: skill adds value (100% vs baseline 0%)
Flask JWT authentication: skill provides requirements.txt that baseline missed
Both configurations perform well on most test cases
weaknesses: Trigger recall 88% - missed 2 core/adjacent intent queries
Trigger false positive on algorithm code request
Behavior improvement marginal (+2%, not statistically significant)
Skill invocation may fail causing truncated output
Eval quality needs improvement - assertions too weak to differentiate skill value
recommendations: Adjust trigger description to better match core intent queries like '创建 FastAPI 项目'
Clarify trigger criteria to avoid algorithm/code snippet requests
Fix skill invocation mechanism to prevent output truncation
Strengthen verification assertions to better differentiate skill value from baseline
Increase runs-per-query to 5-7 for statistical significance
Monitor skill execution to ensure it works reliably when invoked
notes: Skill shows acceptable trigger accuracy (87%) and slight behavioral improvement (+2%), but issues exist: (1) trigger misses some core intent queries, (2) skill invocation may fail causing truncated output, (3) eval quality score is marginal (0.67). Recommend CONDITIONAL APPROVE with monitoring of skill execution reliability.
